TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Masilid, title = Masilid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Masilid} }

S.FORM: Masilid Itiniay i Majia Cen no Pingtung ko Masilid a niyaro', 334 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 994 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 946 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 48 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 90%, Amis 1%, Rukai 3%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan( ,VUSAM ) i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: masiɾiɬ~ɮ itiniaj i majia ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u masiɾiɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan( ,b~vo~u~usam ) i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Masilid Itiniay i Majia Cen no Pingtung ko Masilid a niyaro', 334 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 994 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 946 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 48 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 90%, Amis 1%, Rukai 3%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan( ,VUSAM ) i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: masiɾiɬ~ɮ itiniaj i majia ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u masiɾiɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan( ,b~vo~u~usam ) i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
